title: Tier Tagger
description: Display player's PvP Tiers in their nametag! (MCTiers and SubTiers)
body: # TierTagger The official nametag-tiering mod! *This mod is officially supported by mctiers.com* *Icon by SakuraFX* --- **NOTE:** This mod depends on [ukulib](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukulib) to work! TierTagger is a mod that displays a player's PvP Tier in their nametag. TierTagger supports all 8 MCTIERS game modes. Other tierlists (such as SubTiers) are also supported since version 2.0! The default gamemode to display is configurable. If a player is unranked in a specified game mode, TierTagger will display their highest Tier overall. ![Nametag Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dpkYdLu5/images/f5baba2409a3c129efeba50618548b3a6047d4c7.png) TierTagger also has a built-in system to view a player's profile! ![Player Profile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dpkYdLu5/images/77a754efdb8e409c82b0c7793ef31b170620ae26.png) ## Minecraft version support **Currently supported versions:** 1.21 through 1.21.11 Future version support: once Mojang switches to the new versioning system next year, the last 4 minor releases will be supported. During the transition phase (until 26.4), 1.21.1 and 1.21.11 will remain supported. ## Forking You are allowed to fork this mod and repurpose it for your own tierlists, under a few conditions: - The mod is licensed under the MPL-2.0, which means you need to keep your fork open source with the same license and give proper credit to the original work - The icons currently bundled with the mod (gamemode and website icons) come from MCTiers and SubTiers and permission was explicitly granted for usage in this mod only, you cannot use them in your fork.
